name: Mark-of-the-Web Bypass
description: Detects techniques to bypass the Windows Mark-of-the-Web zone identifier
query:
// Detect MOTW bypass techniques
// Trigger on removal of Zone.Identifier ADS
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(Unblock-File|Zone\.Identifier|deleteFile.*Zone|streams\s+-d|Remove-Item.*-Stream)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
